meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Pricing Strategy for Freelancers: Overcome Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop hunting for ideas. Learn to build high-value SaaS pricing models to solve project stagnation using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert checklist.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing inspiration and start engineering value. By focusing on SaaS pricing models, you transform abstract ideas into revenue-generating assets. Use Antigravity to scaffold your architecture and Claude Code to iterate on logic, turning 'no project' roadblocks into a predictable, scalable development pipeline for your clients.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest adversary. You have the technical stack, but the inspiration is dry, leaving your repository empty and your billable hours stagnant. It is a familiar, suffocating silence where the lack of a project idea morphs into a lack of revenue.

But the secret to a thriving agency isn't waiting for a lightning bolt of genius; it’s engineering a pricing model that dictates the product. When you lead with a high-conversion pricing strategy, the architecture follows. We are going to bypass the creative block by building a SaaS pricing engine, utilizing the raw power of Antigravity and the autonomous velocity of Claude Code.

steps.title: Define Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Don't just code a subscription—code a value ladder. We define three distinct tiers (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) based on usage limits and feature gating to maximize client MRR.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SaaS pricing schema in Prisma/Postgres that supports tiered feature flagging and usage-based billing logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a database schema for SaaS pricing with tiers'

steps.title: Architect the Subscription Logic
steps.description: Implement a robust subscription handler that integrates with Stripe, ensuring your pricing model is technically enforceable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for Stripe integration that maps our database pricing tiers to Stripe subscription plans.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement stripe checkout integration for tiered pricing plans'

steps.title: Implement Dynamic Feature Gating
steps.description: Build a middleware that checks the user's active tier against the requested features, preventing unauthorized access to premium tools.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Next.js middleware function that restricts API routes based on the 'tier' field in the user session.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a feature-gating middleware for next.js'

steps.title: Automate Usage Tracking
steps.description: Freelancers need high-margin work; automated usage tracking allows you to offer 'Pay-as-you-go' models that clients love.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop a usage-metering utility that tracks API calls per user and triggers a webhook when limits are reached.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup redis-based usage metering for api endpoints'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final audit of your pricing logic, ensuring no edge cases exist that allow users to bypass payments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the pricing and gating logic to ensure no race conditions allow tier skipping.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit the pricing logic for security vulnerabilities'

pro_tips: Always price by the outcome, not the feature count; clients pay more for time-saved metrics.
Use Redis for real-time usage tracking to keep your database free for persistent state only.
Implement 'soft' limits that trigger an email notification before hard-blocking a user to reduce churn.
Always include an 'Enterprise' tier that is 'Contact for Pricing' to capture high-value leads automatically.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your pricing logic; if the math fails, your entire business model fails.
content.next_steps: After deploying your pricing engine, perform a user-load simulation to verify that your gating logic holds up under concurrency. Once verified, wrap this boilerplate into a reusable template for your next client project.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the blueprint to turn any idea into a profitable SaaS engine. Stop waiting for inspiration and start shipping high-value, high-margin software today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
